name: Sam LaPorta
headline: Injury-shortened 2025 dents elite TE, still a top-five bet
body:
LaPorta's 2025 was a tale of missed time: nine games, a TE23 finish, and just 66.9 fantasy points after he ranked TE6 (114.6) in 2024 and TE5 (153.3) as a rookie. The volume cratered with the absence, his target share sliding to 8.9 percent and WOPR to 0.186 from 15.9 percent and 0.355 the year prior. The efficiency, though, was loud: a position-best 0.743 EPA per play, a 67.3 percent success rate, 81.6 percent catch rate, and zero drops on 40 catches.

When healthy, LaPorta is a locked-in starter. He played a 90.7 percent snap share when active, and Detroit funnels red-zone work his way, shown by 20 red-zone targets and seven scores in 2024. The 12.22 yards per reception and 6.85 yards after the catch confirm the playmaking remains. At 24 with three years of TE5-or-better-rate production, the only real risk is health. Draft him as a weekly TE1 with top-five upside the moment he is back to a full slate.
